name: @purs-wasm/compiler
description: PureScript CoreFn decoder and Wasm code generator

scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:runtime && node test/e2eCliPrebuild.mjs && spago test -m Test.E2E.Cli --monochrome
scripts.test:bin: npm run build:runtime && node test/effectMain.mjs && node test/sourceForeign.mjs && node test/refNative.mjs && node test/effectPrim.mjs && node test/effectRefMain.mjs && node test/runStringEffect.mjs && node test/examplesRun.mjs && node test/ulibShadow.mjs && node test/arrayForeign.mjs && node test/stringShadow.mjs && node test/showShadow.mjs && node test/intGenericShadow.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:shownumber && npm run test:bin
